🔒 Security Advisory – AeternumDB

📌 Identification

• Vulnerability ID: AETERNUMDB-YYYY-NNNN
• Publication Date: MM/DD/YYYY
• Affected Version: (e.g., 0.1.0 – 0.2.3)
• Fixed Version: (e.g., 0.2.4)
• Severity: High / Medium / Low
• CVE (if applicable): CVE-XXXX-YYYY


---

📖 Description

Clearly explain the vulnerability:

• Which component was affected (Core, SDK, Driver, Extension).
• What was the security issue.
• What impact could occur (e.g., remote code execution, data leak, denial of service).


---

🔄 Impact

• Who could exploit the vulnerability.
• Which scenarios are most critical.
• Examples of possible attacks or failures.


---

🛠️ Mitigation

• Update to the fixed version:cargo update aeternumdb --version X.Y.Z

• If immediate update is not possible:• Apply temporary patch (if available).
• Restrict access to vulnerable component.
• Use firewall rules or additional monitoring.



---

✅ Status

• Vulnerability confirmed
• Fix implemented
• Patch released
• Documentation updated


---

📎 Additional Information

• Internal report: link to technical details (if applicable).
• Credits: acknowledgments to the researcher/contributor who reported.
• External references: links to CVE or related articles.
